levelList.name: 要用愛！
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Burst]強度与[Sinking]強度之和每有5級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得10層[PowerOfLoveAndJustice]

levelList.name: 以正義之名！
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Burst]強度与[Sinking]強度之和每有7級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得10層[PowerOfLoveAndJustice]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Burst]強度与[Sinking]強度之和不低于10級，則<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対其施加1層[Binding]

levelList.name: 阿峠納律動
levelList.desc:
主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>指定絶望騎士
次要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>指定[ColdBlackTear]層数最高的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>
- 没有帯有[ColdBlackTear]的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>時，次要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>指定<color=#61DA61>体力</color>最低的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>
対<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>変為0点，且不会触発其[Sinking]或[ColdBlackTear]效果

[WinDuel] 解除1層為次要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>的[ColdBlackTear]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若指定<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則使其増加1級[Burst]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] 若指定<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使其恢復5点<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 若指定<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則使其増加1級[Burst]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] 若指定<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使其恢復5点<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 若指定<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>，則使其増加1級[Burst]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] 若指定<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則使其恢復5点<color=#61DA61>体力</color>

levelList.name: 只能用那招了！
levelList.desc:
[StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[ChasingArcana]
[StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得50点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>
[StartBattle] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Aggro]+20

levelList.name: 咏唱-阿峠納光破斬
levelList.desc:
[StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得50点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>
[StartBattle] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Aggro]+20
[EndBattle] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>為0点，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>撤退

levelList.name: 阿峠納光破斬
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
不会対遺忘騎士之剣造成<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
命中帯有[WornOutKnight]的<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>時，結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>
[EndBattle] 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加[UsedTooMuchPower]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>降至其現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>的(100-(其[CollapsedPride]層数×33))%

levelList.name: 阿峠納光破斬
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
僅通過<color=#ffffff>硬幣效果</color>造成<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
不会対毀心之剣、裂心之剣与穿心之剣造成<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
命中帯有[WornOutKnight]且<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不高于600点的<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>時，結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>
[EndBattle] 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加[UsedTooMuchPower]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 造成(<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[CollapsedPride]層数×200)点固定<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>

levelList.name: 只能用那招了！
levelList.desc:
[StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[ChasingArcanahard]
[StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得50点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>
[StartBattle] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Aggro]+20
